goal: 回填早期 health probes、pricing 与 release prep 提交

summary.title: 回填早期 health probes、pricing 与 release prep
summary.what: 为最早一批未覆盖提交建立 Mainline 记录：background health probes、v0.2.0-alpha 文档、per-channel pricing、v0.3.0-alpha 文档、npm publication prep、release checklist、testing docs、example configs、verify.sh 和 development summary。
summary.why: 这些提交构成 pi-router 早期 v0.2/v0.3 release foundation，包含核心功能、文档和发布验证材料；回填后 Mainline 能解释这些功能和发布资产为何存在。
summary.user_goal: 回填早期 health probes、pricing 与 release prep 提交

decisions.rationale: 路由器需要主动了解 provider/channel 可用性，作为 failover 与健康状态判断的基础。
不同 channel/provider 的同一模型可能有不同成本，pricing 需要按 channel 细化而不是只按 model 聚合。

decisions.chose: 添加 release checklist、testing docs、example configs、verify.sh 与 development summary。
decisions.rationale: npm 发布和用户采用需要可复现验证、示例配置和清晰发布说明。

decisions.chose: 把 v0.2/v0.3 alpha 功能、文档和发布资产作为一个 early release foundation backfill。
decisions.rationale: 这些是同一早期 release-prep 阶段的剩余 uncovered commits；合并记录比逐个小 seal 更可读。

review_notes: 这些 commits 是历史回填；当前代码验证已在后续工作线通过。

architectural_claims: Background health probes are part of pi-router's availability/failover foundation.
Pricing can vary by provider/channel and should be represented per channel.
Release quality depends on examples, testing guidance, and verification scripts.
behavioral_changes: Release checklist, testing documentation, examples, verification script, and development summary were added.

data_model_changes.name: per-channel pricing metadata
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Pricing metadata is additive and optional.

migration_notes: Existing configs remain valid; examples document recommended configuration.
